---
title: "People"
---

## Special interest group

The NEMD special interest group of the UK Fluids Network is led by:

```{=html}
<p class="person"><span class="name">Edward Smith</span> <span class="aff">&middot; Brunel University London &middot; SIG leader</span></p>
<p class="person"><span class="name">James Ewen</span> <span class="aff">&middot; Imperial College London &middot; SIG co-leader</span></p>
```

## NEMD 2026 organising committee

```{=html}
<p class="person"><span class="name">Rohit Pillai</span> <span class="aff">&middot; University of Edinburgh &middot; chair</span></p>
<p class="person"><span class="name">Duncan Dockar</span> <span class="aff">&middot; University of Edinburgh</span></p>
<p class="person"><span class="name">Eleonora Ricci</span> <span class="aff">&middot; University of Edinburgh</span></p>
<p class="person"><span class="name">Santiago Romero-Vargas Castrillón</span> <span class="aff">&middot; University of Edinburgh</span></p>
<p class="person"><span class="name">Saikat Datta</span> <span class="aff">&middot; Swansea University</span></p>
<p class="person"><span class="name">Edward Smith</span> <span class="aff">&middot; Brunel University London</span></p>
```

Earlier meetings were organised by their local hosts; each [conference page](conferences.html) credits its organisers.
